lint-all.observation: All 3 samples passed validation: kanban, mobile-onboarding, cli-dashboard

test.observation: No test files found (tests for m2-linter-ci milestone not yet implemented)

lint.observation: Shows usage message when run without files - linter itself is functional

blockingIssues.description: VAL-SPEC-001 requires exactly 6 state types (loading, empty, error, success, offline, permission-denied) with no additional types permitted. However, SPEC.md Appendix A (line 722) and schema.json (line 43) now both contain 13 types including idle, scrollback, editing, search-active, streaming, refreshing, field-selected. The work expanded SPEC to v1.1 but VAL-SPEC-001 explicitly requires the original 6-type set.
blockingIssues.evidence: SPEC.md Appendix A line 722 lists 13 types; schema.json line 43 has 13 types; VAL-SPEC-001 pass criteria requires exactly 6 types

blockingIssues.description: VAL-SPEC-004 and VAL-SPEC-005 require STATE and ROLE ID patterns in SPEC.md to match schema.json. However, SPEC.md embedded JSON schema (lines 614, 648) was not updated: STATE pattern still '^STATE-[A-Z]' (no hyphens) vs schema.json '^STATE-[A-Za-z][a-zA-Z0-9-]*$'; ROLE pattern still '^ROLE-[A-Z]' vs schema.json '^ROLE-[A-Za-z]'. Samples use 'STATE-empty-board' (hyphens) and 'ROLE-authenticated' (lowercase) which don't match the embedded schema.
blockingIssues.evidence: SPEC.md embedded schema lines 614 and 648 vs schema.json patterns and actual sample IDs

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update Error 10 (Invalid Back-Stack Behavior) to include 'Pop' as a valid back-stack value, consistent with SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A which now list Push, Replace, Pop, No, Modal.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: spec-schema-backstack-alignment review found AGENTS.md line 363 still shows only 4 values: Push, Replace, No, Modal
